Getting Started

add
assign()
assign
names()
names
count()
count
abundance()
abundance
report()
report
summary()
summary
dataset
dataset
strollur-package strollur
Store and transfer data used in the analysis of microbial DNA
get_bin_types()
get_bin_types

Importing Data

Want to create and modify dataset objects from your package? Check out these functions
